title: Glyph plugin registration
description: One plugin's registration: plugins/<id>/plugin.json. The folder name must equal the id, and a README.md (the catalog page) must sit next to it. index.json is generated from these files.

id.description: Unique reverse-DNS id; also the folder name here and the install folder name.

version.description: Plugin semver; must increase when packageUrl changes.

apiVersion.description: Glyph plugin-API version. Unstable until 1.0: while the API major is 0, plugins must state the exact host version (currently 0.16.0) and a caret grants nothing; caret ranges apply from 1.0.0.

category.description: Which marketplace section the plugin belongs to.

keywords.description: Extra search terms shown nowhere but matched by the marketplace search.

official.description: Maintained in this repo (source lives in the plugin's folder and packages are released from here). Community plugins omit it.

permissions.description: Capabilities the plugin declares; shown to users in the install consent prompt.

sandbox.description: Run the plugin in an isolated worker (no DOM, network fenced to its network: permissions). Defaults to true when absent; only an explicit false opts into full trust, which users must approve through a separate full-access warning.

packageUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the plugin's release zip (manifest.json plus the manifest-declared files), pinned to a tag.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the packageUrl zip; Glyph verifies the download before installing.
